series_metadata.series_description: File maintained on all applicants applying for license as Embalmer or Funeral Director. All applicants must successfully complete apprenticeship program prior ro the issuance of Embalmers or Funeral Directors licnese. This file contains: 1) Application for Registration; 2) Certification of Apprenticeship; 3) Certificate of Registration; 4) Apprenticeship Pocket Card; 5) Certification of embalmer and funeral director; 6) Termination of apprenticeship (completed by master embalmer and apprentice); 7) Apprentice record card; 8) Master Embalmers or Funeral Directors quarterly progress report; 9) Apprentice quarterly progress case report; 10) Apprentice report of personnel interview with member of the Board of Embalmers and Funeral Directors.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area until completion of apprenticeship program. Upon completion of apprenticeship program. Upon completion of apprenticeship program, incorporate Items 1 - 7 above in Embalmers and Funeral Directors License application History File. Items 8-10, Summarize and record on forms E-8 or Form F-6 as appropriate, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
